---
title: ""
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
    resources:
      - shinylive-sw.js
      - data/index.json
      - data/ccusage_daily.json
      - data/ccusage_sessions.json
      - data/ccusage_blocks.json
      - data/gemini_daily.json
      - data/gemini_sessions.json
      - data/cmonitor_summary.json
      - data/git_commits.json
      - data/git_bus_factor.json
      - data/git_velocity.json
      - data/git_timing.json
      - data/git_crisis.json
      - data/git_churn.json
      - data/git_bugs.json
      - data/git_todo.json
      - data/git_tags.json
      - data/git_file_growth.json
      - data/github_issue_events.json
      - data/unified_sessions.json
      - data/unified_costs.json
      - data/cost_by_project_estimated.json
      - data/predictions.json
      - data/calibration_buckets.json
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 1200

# WebR bundles rlang 1.1.6. dplyr 1.2.1/echarts4r need rlang >= 1.1.7.
# The preload scanner skips re-downloading bundled rlang, so the conflict
# is unavoidable. Solution: use base R + JS ECharts (no dplyr/echarts4r).
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(DT)
library(jsonlite)
library(lubridate, warn.conflicts = FALSE)

# --- Helpers ------------------------------------------------------------------
coalesce2 <- function(x, y) { x[is.na(x)] <- y[is.na(x)]; x }

ec <- function(option, h = "300px", aria_label = "Interactive chart") {
  id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
  j <- toJSON(option, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")
  tagList(
    tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", role = "img", `aria-label` = aria_label,
             style = paste0("width:100%;height:", h, ";cursor:zoom-in")),
    tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id,
      "'),'dark');c.setOption(", j, ");new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
      ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'));",
      # Click-to-fullscreen: export chart as image and show in overlay
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('click',function(){",
      "var url=c.getDataURL({type:'png',pixelRatio:2,backgroundColor:'#000'});",
      "var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.className='fullscreen-overlay';",
      "var img=document.createElement('img');img.src=url;ov.appendChild(img);",
      "ov.onclick=function(){ov.remove()};document.body.appendChild(ov)})})();"
    )))
  )
}

ec_empty <- function(msg = "No data available", h = "300px") {
  ec(list(title = list(text = msg, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 14)),
          grid = list(containLabel = TRUE)), h, aria_label = msg)
}

ec_line <- function(dates, series, h = "300px", y_name = NULL, aria_label = "Line chart") {
  y_axis <- list(type = "value")
  if (!is.null(y_name)) y_axis$name <- y_name
  ec(list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
    legend = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
    toolbox = list(feature = list(
      dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
      restore = list(),
      saveAsImage = list()
    )),
    dataZoom = list(
      list(type = "inside", start = 0, end = 100),
      list(type = "slider", start = 0, end = 100, bottom = 5)
    ),
    grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
    xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(as.character(dates))),
    yAxis = y_axis,
    series = series
  ), h, aria_label = aria_label)
}

ec_bar <- function(cats, series, h = "300px", y_name = NULL, aria_label = "Bar chart") {
  y_axis <- list(type = "value")
  if (!is.null(y_name)) y_axis$name <- y_name
  ec(list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
    legend = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
    toolbox = list(feature = list(
      dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
      restore = list(),
      saveAsImage = list()
    )),
    dataZoom = list(
      list(type = "inside", start = 0, end = 100),
      list(type = "slider", start = 0, end = 100, bottom = 5)
    ),
    grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
    xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(as.character(cats)),
                 axisLabel = list(rotate = 30)),
    yAxis = y_axis,
    series = series
  ), h, aria_label = aria_label)
}

ec_scatter <- function(data_pts, color = "#377eb8", h = "300px",
                       x_type = "value", size_col = 3, scale = 3) {
  id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
  opt <- list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "item"),
    grid = list(containLabel = TRUE),
    xAxis = list(type = x_type),
    yAxis = list(type = "value"),
    series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = data_pts,
                       itemStyle = list(color = color)))
  )
  j <- toJSON(opt, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")
  tagList(
    tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", style = paste0("width:100%;height:", h)),
    tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id, "'),'dark');",
      "var o=", j, ";",
      "o.series[0].symbolSize=function(d){return Math.max(5,Math.sqrt(Math.abs(d[",
      size_col - 1, "]))*", scale, ")};",
      "c.setOption(o);new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
      ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'))})();"
    )))
  )
}

pal <- list(claude = "#377eb8", gemini = "#e41a1c", accent = "#4daf4a",
            purple = "#984ea3", orange = "#ff7f00", hist = "#377eb8")

# --- Data loading -------------------------------------------------------------
base_url <- "https://johngavin.github.io/llmtelemetry"

load_json <- function(filename) {
  tryCatch({
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")
    download.file(paste0(base_url, "/data/", filename), tmp, mode = "w", quiet = TRUE)
    fromJSON(txt = tmp, simplifyDataFrame = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Failed to load ", filename, ": ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
}

cc_daily    <- load_json("ccusage_daily.json")
cc_sessions <- load_json("ccusage_sessions.json")
cc_blocks   <- load_json("ccusage_blocks.json")
gem_daily   <- load_json("gemini_daily.json")
gem_sess    <- load_json("gemini_sessions.json")
cmon        <- load_json("cmonitor_summary.json")
git_commits <- load_json("git_commits.json")
u_sessions  <- load_json("unified_sessions.json")
u_costs     <- load_json("unified_costs.json")
cost_proj   <- load_json("cost_by_project_estimated.json")
preds_raw   <- load_json("predictions.json")
cal_buckets <- load_json("calibration_buckets.json")
git_bus     <- load_json("git_bus_factor.json")
git_vel     <- load_json("git_velocity.json")
git_timing  <- load_json("git_timing.json")
git_crisis  <- load_json("git_crisis.json")
git_churn   <- load_json("git_churn.json")
git_bugs    <- load_json("git_bugs.json")
git_todo    <- load_json("git_todo.json")
git_tags    <- load_json("git_tags.json")
git_file_growth <- load_json("git_file_growth.json")
gh_events   <- load_json("github_issue_events.json")

# Normalize data: fromJSON("[]") returns list(), nested objects need extraction
as_df <- function(x) if (is.data.frame(x)) x else NULL
git_file_growth <- as_df(git_file_growth)
gh_events <- as_df(gh_events)
has_rows <- function(x) is.data.frame(x) && nrow(x) > 0

# Shorten project path: keep last 2 meaningful segments
# Also strip worktree suffixes to aggregate to project level
shorten_proj <- function(x) {
  x <- sub("^-Users-johngavin-docs[-_]gh-", "", x)
  x <- sub("^llm-", "", x)
  x <- sub("^proj-", "", x)
  # Strip worktree suffixes (e.g., "roborev-worktree-1234567890" -> "roborev")
  x <- sub("-worktree-[0-9]+$", "", x)
  gsub("-", "/", x)
}

# Clean model name: remove quotes, braces, claude- prefix, simplify
clean_model <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub('["\']', '', x)           # Remove quotes

x <- gsub('[()]', '', x)            # Remove parentheses
  x <- gsub('^claude-', '', x)        # Remove claude- prefix
  x <- trimws(x)                      # Trim whitespace
  x
}

# ccusage_daily may be flat array OR nested {"projects": {...}} (CI fallback)
if (is.list(cc_daily) && !is.data.frame(cc_daily)) {
  if ("projects" %in% names(cc_daily)) {
    parts <- lapply(names(cc_daily$projects), function(p) {
      d <- cc_daily$projects[[p]]
      if (is.data.frame(d) && nrow(d) > 0) { d$project <- shorten_proj(p); d } else NULL
    })
    cc_daily <- do.call(rbind, Filter(Negate(is.null), parts))
  } else {
    cc_daily <- NULL
  }
}
# Normalize column names: raw ccusage uses cacheCreationTokens, cmonitor uses cacheCreation
if (has_rows(cc_daily)) {
  nm <- names(cc_daily)
  if ("cacheCreationTokens" %in% nm && !"cacheCreation" %in% nm)
    names(cc_daily)[nm == "cacheCreationTokens"] <- "cacheCreation"
  if ("cacheReadTokens" %in% nm && !"cacheRead" %in% nm)
    names(cc_daily)[nm == "cacheReadTokens"] <- "cacheRead"
}

# ccusage_blocks may be wrapped in {"blocks": [...]}
if (is.list(cc_blocks) && !is.data.frame(cc_blocks)) {
  cc_blocks <- as_df(cc_blocks$blocks)
}
# Normalize blocks: extract nested tokenCounts, filter out gaps
if (has_rows(cc_blocks)) {
  if ("isGap" %in% names(cc_blocks)) {
    cc_blocks <- cc_blocks[!cc_blocks$isGap, ]
  }
  if ("tokenCounts" %in% names(cc_blocks) && is.data.frame(cc_blocks$tokenCounts)) {
    tc <- cc_blocks$tokenCounts
    if ("inputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$inputTokens <- tc$inputTokens
    if ("outputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$outputTokens <- tc$outputTokens
    if ("cacheCreationInputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$cacheCreation <- tc$cacheCreationInputTokens
    if ("cacheReadInputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$cacheRead <- tc$cacheReadInputTokens
  }
  # models may be a list column — collapse to string
  if ("models" %in% names(cc_blocks) && is.list(cc_blocks$models)) {
    cc_blocks$models <- vapply(cc_blocks$models, function(m) paste(m, collapse = ", "), "")
  }
}

cc_sessions <- as_df(cc_sessions)
gem_daily   <- as_df(gem_daily)
gem_sess    <- as_df(gem_sess)
git_commits <- as_df(git_commits)
u_sessions  <- as_df(u_sessions)
u_costs     <- as_df(u_costs)
preds_raw   <- as_df(preds_raw)
cal_buckets <- as_df(cal_buckets)
git_vel     <- as_df(git_vel)
git_timing  <- as_df(git_timing)
git_crisis  <- as_df(git_crisis)
git_churn   <- as_df(git_churn)
git_bugs    <- as_df(git_bugs)
git_todo    <- as_df(git_todo)
git_tags    <- as_df(git_tags)
git_file_growth <- as_df(git_file_growth)
# git_bus is a list with $all_time and $recent_6mo data frames
if (is.list(git_bus) && !is.data.frame(git_bus)) {
  git_bus$all_time <- as_df(git_bus$all_time)
  git_bus$recent_6mo <- as_df(git_bus$recent_6mo)
} else {
  git_bus <- list(all_time = NULL, recent_6mo = NULL)
}

# Parse dates
parse_ts <- function(x) {
  t <- as.POSIXct(x, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC")
  na_idx <- is.na(t) & !is.na(x)
  if (any(na_idx)) t[na_idx] <- as.POSIXct(x[na_idx], format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
  t
}

if (has_rows(cc_daily)) {
  cc_daily$date <- as.Date(cc_daily$date)
}
if (has_rows(cc_sessions)) {
  cc_sessions$lastActivity <- as.Date(cc_sessions$lastActivity)
}
if (has_rows(cc_blocks)) {
  cc_blocks$startTime <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$endTime   <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$endTime)
  cc_blocks$actualEndTime <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$actualEndTime)
  cc_blocks$date <- as.Date(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$hour <- hour(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$wday <- wday(cc_blocks$startTime, label = TRUE)
  eff_end <- coalesce2(cc_blocks$actualEndTime, cc_blocks$endTime)
  cc_blocks$duration_hrs <- as.numeric(difftime(eff_end, cc_blocks$startTime, units = "hours"))
  cc_blocks$cost_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$costUSD / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 2), 0)
  cc_blocks$tok_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$totalTokens / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 0), 0)
}
if (has_rows(gem_daily)) gem_daily$date <- as.Date(gem_daily$date)
if (has_rows(git_commits)) git_commits$date <- as.Date(git_commits$date)
if (has_rows(u_sessions)) {
  # Extract date and time separately (WebR POSIXct loses time portion)
  u_sessions$date <- as.Date(substr(u_sessions$started_at, 1, 10))
  u_sessions$time_str <- substr(u_sessions$started_at, 12, 16)  # "HH:MM"
  u_sessions$started_at <- as.POSIXct(u_sessions$started_at, tz = "UTC")
}
if (has_rows(u_costs)) u_costs$date <- as.Date(u_costs$date)
if (has_rows(gem_sess)) {
  gem_sess$start_time <- as.POSIXct(gem_sess$start_time, tz = "UTC")
  gem_sess$date <- as.Date(gem_sess$start_time)
}

# Get unique projects from unified_sessions (has real project names)
all_projects <- character(0)
if (has_rows(u_sessions) && "project" %in% names(u_sessions)) {
  # Count sessions per project, sorted by frequency
  proj_counts <- table(u_sessions$project)
  proj_counts <- sort(proj_counts, decreasing = TRUE)
  all_projects <- names(proj_counts)
  # Shorten project names for display
  all_projects <- shorten_proj(all_projects)
  # Also shorten the column in u_sessions for filtering
  u_sessions$project_short <- shorten_proj(u_sessions$project)
}

all_dates <- c(
  if (has_rows(cc_daily)) cc_daily$date,
  if (has_rows(gem_daily)) gem_daily$date
)
date_min <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) min(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date() - 30
date_max <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) max(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date()
max_days <- as.numeric(date_max - date_min)

# --- UI -----------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- page_navbar(
  title = "LLM Telemetry",
  theme = bs_theme(
    bg = "#1a1a1a", fg = "#e0e0e0",
    primary = "#377eb8", secondary = "#555555",
    font_scale = 0.85
  ),
  header = tagList(
    tags$script(src = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5/dist/echarts.min.js"),
    tags$style(HTML("
      .bslib-value-box .value-box-value { font-size: 1.4rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
      .bslib-value-box .value-box-title { font-size: 0.75rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
      .card { background-color: #222 !important; border-color: #444 !important; cursor: zoom-in; }
      .card-header { background-color: #2a2a2a !important; color: #e0e0e0 !important; font-size: 0.85rem; }
      .card-footer { background-color: #1a1a1a !important; border-color: #333 !important; }
      .sidebar-content { background-color: #222 !important; }
      table.dataTable th, table.dataTable td { white-space: nowrap !important; }
      table.dataTable { color: #e0e0e0 !important; }
      table.dataTable thead th { color: #e0e0e0 !important; background-color: #2a2a2a !important; }
      table.dataTable tbody td { border-color: #444 !important; }
      .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter input { background-color: #333; color: #e0e0e0; border-color: #555; }
      .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_info, .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_paginate { color: #ccc !important; }
      .dataTables_scrollBody { max-height: none !important; }
      .card.card-fullscreen {
        position: fixed !important; top: 50% !important; left: 50% !important;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) !important;
        width: 96vw !important; max-height: 55vh !important; z-index: 99999 !important;
        background: #1a1a1a !important; cursor: zoom-out !important;
        overflow: auto !important; border-radius: 6px !important;
        padding: 10px !important; margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.9) !important;
      }
      .card.card-fullscreen .echart-div {
        width: calc(96vw - 40px) !important; height: 42vh !important;
      }
      .card.card-fullscreen .dataTables_wrapper {
        font-size: 14px; overflow: auto; max-height: 42vh;
      }
      .card-fullscreen-hint {
        position: fixed; top: 8px; right: 20px; color: #888;
        font-size: 12px; z-index: 100000; pointer-events: none;
      }
      /* Click-to-fullscreen overlay for ECharts */
      .fullscreen-overlay {
        position: fixed !important; top: 0 !important; left: 0 !important;
        width: 100vw !important; height: 100vh !important;
        z-index: 99999 !important; background: #000 !important;
        padding: 10px !important; overflow: auto !important; cursor: zoom-out !important;
      }
      .fullscreen-overlay img {
        width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important; object-fit: contain !important;
      }
      /* Clickable value boxes */
      .bslib-value-box { cursor: pointer !important; transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; }
      .bslib-value-box:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(55, 126, 184, 0.3); }
    ")),
    tags$script(HTML("
      var fsCard = null;
      var fsHint = null;
      function exitFullscreen() {
        if (!fsCard) return;
        var card = fsCard;
        card.classList.remove('card-fullscreen');
        fsCard = null;
        if (fsHint) { fsHint.remove(); fsHint = null; }
        // Resize charts back to normal size
        setTimeout(function() {
          card.querySelectorAll('.echart-div').forEach(function(el) {
            var inst = echarts.getInstanceByDom(el);
            if (inst) inst.resize();
          });
        }, 100);
      }
      function enterFullscreen(card) {
        if (fsCard) exitFullscreen();
        fsCard = card;
        card.classList.add('card-fullscreen');
        fsHint = document.createElement('div');
        fsHint.className = 'card-fullscreen-hint';
        fsHint.textContent = 'Click card or press Esc to exit';
        document.body.appendChild(fsHint);
        var dtApi = card.querySelector('.dataTable');
        if (dtApi && dtApi.DataTable) {
          try { dtApi.DataTable().columns.adjust(); } catch(e) {}
        }
        card.querySelectorAll('.echart-div').forEach(function(el) {
          var inst = echarts.getInstanceByDom(el);
          if (inst) inst.resize();
        });
      }
      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        var card = e.target.closest('.card');
        if (!card) return;
        if (card.querySelector('.value-box-value')) return;
        if (fsCard === card) exitFullscreen();
        else if (!fsCard) enterFullscreen(card);
      });
      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') exitFullscreen();
      });
      // Clickable value boxes — navigate to relevant tab
      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        var vbox = e.target.closest('.bslib-value-box');
        if (!vbox) return;
        var title = vbox.querySelector('.value-box-title');
        if (!title) return;
        var txt = title.textContent.toLowerCase();
        var targetTab = null;
        if (txt.includes('cost')) targetTab = 'Cost Trends';
        else if (txt.includes('token')) targetTab = 'Token Analysis';
        else if (txt.includes('session')) targetTab = 'Sessions';
        else if (txt.includes('day')) targetTab = 'Cost Trends';
        else if (txt.includes('commit') || txt.includes('lines')) targetTab = 'Commits';
        if (targetTab) {
          // Find and click the nav link for the target tab
          var navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.navbar-nav .nav-link, .nav-pills .nav-link');
          navLinks.forEach(function(link) {
            if (link.textContent.trim() === targetTab) link.click();
          });
        }
      });
    "))
  ),
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 220,
    sliderInput("horizon", "Time Horizon (days)",
      min = 1, max = 30, value = 30, step = 1),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Cost Trends' || input.tabs == 'Token Analysis' || input.tabs == 'Sessions' || input.tabs == 'By Project'",
      selectInput("projects", "Projects", choices = all_projects,
        selected = all_projects, multiple = TRUE),
      tags$div(style = "display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-top: -10px;",
        actionButton("sel_all", "All", class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary"),
        actionButton("sel_none", "None", class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary"),
        actionButton("sel_invert", "Invert", class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary")
      )
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Sessions'",
      numericInput("top_n", "Top N sessions", value = 10, min = 5, max = 50)
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Time Blocks'",
      sliderInput("block_days", "Block window (days)",
        min = 1, max = 60, value = 14, step = 1)
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Overview", value = "Overview",
    layout_columns(
      fill = FALSE, col_widths = c(3, 3, 3, 3),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Total Cost", textOutput("vb_cost"), theme = "primary"),
        "Sum of API charges for input, output, and cache tokens (Claude + Gemini)"
      ),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Total Tokens", textOutput("vb_tokens"), theme = "info"),
        "Sum of input + output + cache tokens across all providers"
      ),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Active Days", textOutput("vb_days"), theme = "success"),
        "Days with at least one API call in the selected time horizon"
      ),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Sessions", textOutput("vb_sessions"), theme = "warning"),
        "Claude Code sessions from unified.duckdb telemetry"
      )
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Source Summary"), DTOutput("overview_table"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost, tokens, and session counts per data source"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost (All Sources)"), uiOutput("overview_cost_ts"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily cost time series combining Claude and Gemini usage"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Cost Trends", value = "Cost Trends",
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost by Project (Estimated)"), uiOutput("cost_by_project"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Estimated daily cost by project using session duration as allocation key")),
      card(card_header("Cumulative Cost"), uiOutput("cost_cumulative"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Running total of cost over time by source"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Source"), uiOutput("cost_weekly"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly cost grouped by Claude vs Gemini")),
      card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Model"), uiOutput("cost_by_model"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly cost by Claude model variant"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Token Analysis", value = "Token Analysis",
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Tokens"), uiOutput("token_daily"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily token consumption across all sources"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Token Composition"), uiOutput("token_comp"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Stacked bars: input, output, cache-create, and cache-read tokens")),
      card(card_header("Weekly Tokens by Source"), uiOutput("token_weekly"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly token usage by source"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Sessions", value = "Sessions",
    layout_columns(
      fill = FALSE, col_widths = c(4, 4, 4),
      tooltip(
        value_box("API Conversations", textOutput("vb_sess_count"), theme = "primary"),
        "Count of Claude Code conversations (each restart = new session)"
      ),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Total Duration", textOutput("vb_sess_duration"), theme = "info"),
        "Sum of all conversation durations (minutes)"
      ),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Avg Duration", textOutput("vb_sess_avg"), theme = "success"),
        "Average conversation length (minutes)"
      )
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Recent API Conversations"), DTOutput("sess_claude"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "⚠ These are API conversations, not work sessions. Each Claude Code restart = new conversation. Short durations are normal.")),
      card(card_header("Top Gemini Sessions"), DTOutput("sess_gemini"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Most expensive Gemini sessions by total cost"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Conversation Duration Distribution"), uiOutput("sess_hist"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Histogram of API conversation durations (minutes)")),
      card(card_header("Conversations Over Time"), uiOutput("sess_scatter"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily conversation count, bubble size = total minutes"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("By Project", value = "By Project",
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Estimated Cost by Project"), uiOutput("proj_cost_total"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Session-weighted cost estimate (⚠ approximate)")),
      card(card_header("Sessions by Project"), uiOutput("proj_sessions"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Session count per project"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost Trend by Project"), uiOutput("proj_cost_daily"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Stacked area chart of estimated daily costs"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Session Duration by Project"), uiOutput("proj_duration"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Total session minutes per project")),
      card(card_header("Cost Share by Date"), uiOutput("proj_share_heatmap"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Heatmap: project cost share by date"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Time Blocks", value = "Time Blocks",
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Block Activity"), DTOutput("block_table"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Claude coding blocks with cost and efficiency metrics"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Block Timeline"), uiOutput("block_timeline"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost per block, dot size = duration")),
      card(card_header("Hourly Activity Heatmap"), uiOutput("block_heatmap"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost heatmap by day of week and hour"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Commits", value = "Commits",
    tags$div(class = "alert alert-info mb-3", style = "font-size: 0.85em;",
      tags$strong("Note:"), " This tab shows commits for the llmtelemetry repo only. ",
      "Multi-project git metrics are in the ", tags$strong("Repo Health"), " tab."),
    layout_columns(
      fill = FALSE, col_widths = c(4, 4, 4),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Total Commits", textOutput("vb_commits"), theme = "primary"),
        "Git commits in llmtelemetry repo (single project)"
      ),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Median Lines", textOutput("vb_median_lines"), theme = "info"),
        "Median lines changed per commit (additions + deletions)"
      ),
      tooltip(
        value_box("Mean Lines", textOutput("vb_mean_lines"), theme = "success"),
        "Mean lines changed per commit (additions + deletions)"
      )
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Lines Changed per Commit"), uiOutput("commit_hist"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Distribution of total lines changed per commit (llmtelemetry repo)"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Lines Changed Over Time"), uiOutput("commit_scatter_time"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines changed per commit over time, sized by files changed")),
      card(card_header("Additions vs Deletions"), uiOutput("commit_scatter_add_del"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines added vs deleted per commit"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Repo Health", value = "Repo Health",
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Bus Factor (All Time)"), uiOutput("rh_bus_all"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Contributor commit share — 1 person at 60%+ = risk")),
      card(card_header("Bus Factor (6 Months)"), uiOutput("rh_bus_6mo"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Recent contributor concentration"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Velocity Trend"), uiOutput("rh_velocity"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Commits per month")),
      card(card_header("Commit Timing Heatmap"), uiOutput("rh_timing"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "When commits happen — hour vs day of week"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("File Growth (6-Month Rolling)"), uiOutput("rh_file_growth"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "6-month rolling aggregate of files added vs deleted — green = additions, red = deletions"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Churn Hotspots"), uiOutput("rh_churn"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Most-modified files in last 6 months")),
      card(card_header("Bug Hotspots"), uiOutput("rh_bugs"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Files most often touched by fix/bug commits"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("TODO/FIXME Debt"), DTOutput("rh_todo"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Technical debt markers by file")),
      card(card_header("Crisis Commits"), DTOutput("rh_crisis"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Reverts, hotfixes, and emergency commits (last year)"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("GitHub Issue Activity (Last 30 Days)"), uiOutput("gh_events_chart"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Issue open/close/label events across tracked projects"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Calibration", value = "Calibration",
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Reliability Diagram"), uiOutput("cal_reliability"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Predicted confidence vs actual accuracy by bucket. Diagonal = perfect calibration.")),
      card(card_header("Brier Score Trend"), uiOutput("cal_brier"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Rolling Brier score over time (0 = perfect, 0.25 = uninformative)"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Accuracy by Task Type"), uiOutput("cal_by_type"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Success rate per task category")),
      card(card_header("Accuracy by Project"), uiOutput("cal_by_project"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Success rate per project (estimated cost allocation)"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Prediction Log"), DTOutput("cal_log"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "All predictions with stated confidence, outcome, and notes"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Glossary", value = "Glossary", icon = icon("book"),
    card(card_header("Metric Definitions"),
      tags$div(class = "p-3", style = "color: #e0e0e0; font-size: 0.9em;",
        tags$h5("Cost Metrics"),
        tags$dl(
          tags$dt("Total Cost ($)"), tags$dd("Sum of API charges for input, output, and cache tokens."),
          tags$dt("Cost per MTok"), tags$dd("Cost per million tokens — efficiency metric."),
          tags$dt("Cumulative Cost"), tags$dd("Running total of spend over time."),
          tags$dt("Est. Cost by Project"), tags$dd("⚠ Approximate: daily cost × (project session time / total session time). No per-project billing from API.")
        ),
        tags$h5("Token Metrics"),
        tags$dl(
          tags$dt("Input Tokens"), tags$dd("Tokens sent to the model (prompts, context)."),
          tags$dt("Output Tokens"), tags$dd("Tokens generated by the model (responses)."),
          tags$dt("Cache Creation"), tags$dd("Tokens written to prompt cache (first use)."),
          tags$dt("Cache Read"), tags$dd("Tokens retrieved from cache (subsequent uses, cheaper).")
        ),
        tags$h5("Session Metrics"),
        tags$dl(
          tags$dt("API Conversation"), tags$dd("Single Claude Code conversation. Short durations (0-5 min) are normal — each context compaction or restart creates a new conversation."),
          tags$dt("Duration (min)"), tags$dd("Time from conversation start to end. NOT user work time."),
          tags$dt("Block"), tags$dd("Contiguous coding period from ccusage; gaps >30 min create new blocks. More meaningful than API conversations.")
        ),
        tags$h5("Repo Health Metrics"),
        tags$dl(
          tags$dt("Bus Factor"), tags$dd("Risk metric: if 1 person has >60% of commits, project is at risk if they leave. Low bus factor = knowledge concentration."),
          tags$dt("Velocity Trend"), tags$dd("Commits per month — indicates project momentum. Declining velocity may signal reduced activity or scope completion."),
          tags$dt("Commit Timing"), tags$dd("Heatmap of when commits happen by hour and day. Shows work patterns and potential burnout signals."),
          tags$dt("File Growth"), tags$dd("6-month rolling aggregate of files added vs deleted. Net positive = codebase growing."),
          tags$dt("Churn Hotspots"), tags$dd("Files modified most often. High churn = refactoring candidates or unstable design."),
          tags$dt("Bug Hotspots"), tags$dd("Files frequently touched by fix/bug commits. May indicate code quality issues."),
          tags$dt("TODO/FIXME Debt"), tags$dd("Count of TODO, FIXME, HACK markers. Technical debt that should be tracked."),
          tags$dt("Crisis Commits"), tags$dd("Reverts, hotfixes, emergency commits. High count = unstable releases.")
        ),
        tags$h5("Calibration Metrics"),
        tags$dl(
          tags$dt("Calibration"), tags$dd("How well predicted confidence matches actual outcomes. 80% confident predictions should succeed ~80% of the time."),
          tags$dt("Brier Score"), tags$dd("Mean squared error of predictions. 0 = perfect, 0.25 = no better than guessing. Lower is better."),
          tags$dt("Reliability Diagram"), tags$dd("Plot of predicted confidence vs actual success rate. Points on diagonal = perfectly calibrated."),
          tags$dt("Overconfidence"), tags$dd("Predictions above diagonal — stated confidence exceeds actual accuracy."),
          tags$dt("Underconfidence"), tags$dd("Predictions below diagonal — actual accuracy exceeds stated confidence.")
        )
      ),
      card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Hover over charts for tooltips; click chart to fullscreen; click card to expand")
    )
  ),

  footer = tags$footer(
    class = "text-muted small text-center py-2",
    style = "background-color: #1a1a1a;",
    tags$a(href = "https://github.com/johngavin/llmtelemetry", style = "color: #7cb5ec;", "GitHub"),
    " | Data: ccusage, Gemini, cmonitor, unified.duckdb, git-recon, predictions",
    " | Built: ", format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")
  ),
  id = "tabs"
)

# --- Server -------------------------------------------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  cutoff <- reactive(date_max - input$horizon)

  cc_d <- reactive({
    if (!has_rows(cc_daily)) return(data.frame())
    cc_daily[cc_daily$date >= cutoff(), ]
  })
  gem_d <- reactive({
    if (!has_rows(gem_daily)) return(data.frame())
    gem_daily[gem_daily$date >= cutoff(), ]
  })
  cc_d_proj <- reactive({
    d <- cc_d()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(d)
    if (length(input$projects) > 0) d <- d[d$project %in% input$projects, ]
    d
  })

  # --- Project filter buttons -------------------------------------------------
  observeEvent(input$sel_all, {
    updateSelectInput(session, "projects", selected = all_projects)
  })
  observeEvent(input$sel_none, {
    updateSelectInput(session, "projects", selected = character(0))
  })
  observeEvent(input$sel_invert, {
    current <- input$projects
    inverted <- setdiff(all_projects, current)
    updateSelectInput(session, "projects", selected = inverted)
  })

  # --- Overview ---------------------------------------------------------------
  output$vb_cost <- renderText({
    cc <- if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) sum(cc_d()$totalCost, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    gm <- if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) sum(gem_d()$total_cost, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    sprintf("$%s", format(round(cc + gm), big.mark = ","))
  })
  output$vb_tokens <- renderText({
    cc <- if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) sum(cc_d()$totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    gm <- if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) sum(gem_d()$total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    total <- cc + gm
    if (total >= 1e9) sprintf("%.1fB", total / 1e9)
    else if (total >= 1e6) sprintf("%.1fM", total / 1e6)
    else format(total, big.mark = ",")
  })
  output$vb_days <- renderText({
    dates <- c(
      if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) unique(cc_d()$date),
      if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) unique(gem_d()$date)
    )
    as.character(length(unique(dates)))
  })
  output$vb_sessions <- renderText({
    n <- 0L
    if (has_rows(u_sessions)) {
      n <- nrow(u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ])
    }
    if (has_rows(gem_sess)) {
      n <- n + nrow(gem_sess[gem_sess$date >= cutoff(), ])
    }
    as.character(n)
  })

  output$overview_table <- renderDT({
    rows <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      d <- cc_d()
      rows[[1]] <- data.frame(
        Source = "Claude (ccusage)",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", sum(d$totalCost, na.rm = TRUE)),
        `$/Day` = sprintf("$%.2f", sum(d$totalCost, na.rm = TRUE) / max(length(unique(d$date)), 1)),
        Tokens = format(sum(d$totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","),
        Days = length(unique(d$date)),
        Sessions = if (has_rows(u_sessions)) nrow(u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ]) else 0L,
        `Date Range` = paste(min(d$date), "to", max(d$date)),
        check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      d <- gem_d()
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        Source = "Gemini",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", sum(d$total_cost, na.rm = TRUE)),
        `$/Day` = sprintf("$%.2f", sum(d$total_cost, na.rm = TRUE) / max(length(unique(d$date)), 1)),
        Tokens = format(sum(d$total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","),
        Days = length(unique(d$date)),
        Sessions = if (has_rows(gem_sess)) nrow(gem_sess[gem_sess$date >= cutoff(), ]) else 0L,
        `Date Range` = paste(min(d$date), "to", max(d$date)),
        check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    if (!is.null(cmon) && !is.null(cmon$total_cost)) {
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        Source = "cmonitor",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", cmon$total_cost),
        `$/Day` = "-",
        Tokens = format(cmon$total_tokens, big.mark = ","),
        Days = NA_integer_,
        Sessions = NA_integer_,
        `Date Range` = if (!is.null(cmon$date_range)) cmon$date_range else "-",
        check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    tbl <- if (length(rows) > 0) do.call(rbind, rows) else data.frame()
    datatable(tbl, options = list(dom = "t", paging = FALSE, searching = FALSE,
        scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = FALSE), rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$overview_cost_ts <- renderUI({
    has_cc <- nrow(cc_d()) > 0
    has_gem <- nrow(gem_d()) > 0
    if (!has_cc && !has_gem) return(ec_empty(h = "350px"))

    cc_agg <- gem_agg <- NULL
    if (has_cc) {
      cc_agg <- aggregate(totalCost ~ date, data = cc_d(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(cc_agg)[2] <- "claude"
    }
    if (has_gem) {
      gem_agg <- aggregate(total_cost ~ date, data = gem_d(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(gem_agg)[2] <- "gemini"
    }

    if (has_cc && has_gem) {
      d <- merge(cc_agg, gem_agg, by = "date", all = TRUE)
      d$claude[is.na(d$claude)] <- 0
      d$gemini[is.na(d$gemini)] <- 0
      d <- d[order(d$date), ]
      series <- list(
        list(name = "Claude", type = "line", data = I(round(d$claude, 2)),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude)),
        list(name = "Gemini", type = "line", data = I(round(d$gemini, 2)),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini)))
      ec_line(d$date, series, "350px", y_name = "Cost ($)")
    } else if (has_cc) {
      cc_agg <- cc_agg[order(cc_agg$date), ]
      ec_line(cc_agg$date, list(
        list(name = "Claude", type = "line", data = I(round(cc_agg$claude, 2)),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude))), "350px", y_name = "Cost ($)")
    } else {
      gem_agg <- gem_agg[order(gem_agg$date), ]
      ec_line(gem_agg$date, list(
        list(name = "Gemini", type = "line", data = I(round(gem_agg$gemini, 2)),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini))), "350px", y_name = "Cost ($)")
    }
  })

  # --- Cost Trends ------------------------------------------------------------
  output$cost_by_project <- renderUI({
    d <- cost_proj
    if (!is.data.frame(d) || nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No project cost estimates available"))
    # Apply date and project filters
    if (!is.null(input$date_range) && length(input$date_range) == 2) {
      d <- d[d$date >= input$date_range[1] & d$date <= input$date_range[2], ]
    }
    if (length(input$projects) > 0) {
      d <- d[d$project %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No data for selected filters"))

    all_d <- sort(unique(d$date))
    projects <- unique(d$project)
    series <- lapply(projects, function(p) {
      pd <- d[d$project == p, ]
      vals <- rep(0, length(all_d))
      vals[match(pd$date, all_d)] <- pd$est_cost
      list(name = p, type = "line", data = I(round(vals, 2)))
    })
    ec_line(all_d, series, y_name = "Estimated Cost ($)",
            aria_label = "Estimated daily cost by project (session-weighted)")
  })

  output$cost_cumulative <- renderUI({
    has_cc <- nrow(cc_d()) > 0
    has_gem <- nrow(gem_d()) > 0
    if (!has_cc && !has_gem) return(ec_empty())

    cc_cum <- gem_cum <- NULL
    if (has_cc) {
      a <- aggregate(totalCost ~ date, data = cc_d(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      a <- a[order(a$date), ]
      cc_cum <- data.frame(date = a$date, claude = cumsum(a$totalCost))
    }
    if (has_gem) {
      g <- gem_d()[order(gem_d()$date), ]
      gem_cum <- data.frame(date = g$date, gemini = cumsum(g$total_cost))
    }

    if (has_cc && has_gem) {
      d <- merge(cc_cum, gem_cum, by = "date", all = TRUE)
      d$claude[is.na(d$claude)] <- 0
      d$gemini[is.na(d$gemini)] <- 0
      d <- d[order(d$date), ]
      # Forward-fill cumulative values after merge
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(d))[-1]) {
        if (d$claude[i] == 0 && d$claude[i-1] > 0) d$claude[i] <- d$claude[i-1]
        if (d$gemini[i] == 0 && d$gemini[i-1] > 0) d$gemini[i] <- d$gemini[i-1]
      }
      series <- list(
        list(name = "Claude", type = "line", data = I(round(d$claude, 2)),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude)),
        list(name = "Gemini", type = "line", data = I(round(d$gemini, 2)),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini)))
      ec_line(d$date, series, y_name = "Cost ($)")
    } else if (has_cc) {
      ec_line(cc_cum$date, list(list(name = "Claude", type = "line",
        data = I(round(cc_cum$claude, 2)), itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude))),
        y_name = "Cost ($)")
    } else {
      ec_line(gem_cum$date, list(list(name = "Gemini", type = "line",
        data = I(round(gem_cum$gemini, 2)), itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini))),
        y_name = "Cost ($)")
    }
  })

  output$cost_weekly <- renderUI({
    rows <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      d <- cc_d()
      d$week <- floor_date(d$date, "week")
      a <- aggregate(totalCost ~ week, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      a$source <- "Claude"
      rows[[1]] <- a
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      d <- gem_d()
      d$week <- floor_date(d$date, "week")
      a <- aggregate(total_cost ~ week, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(a)[2] <- "totalCost"
      a$source <- "Gemini"
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- a
    }
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    d <- do.call(rbind, rows)
    all_weeks <- sort(unique(d$week))
    sources <- unique(d$source)
    series <- lapply(sources, function(s) {
      sd <- d[d$source == s, ]
      vals <- rep(0, length(all_weeks))
      vals[match(sd$week, all_weeks)] <- sd$totalCost
      list(name = s, type = "bar", data = I(round(vals, 2)),
           itemStyle = list(color = if (s == "Claude") pal$claude else pal$gemini))
    })
    ec_bar(all_weeks, series)
  })

  output$cost_by_model <- renderUI({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0 || is.null(d$modelsUsed)) return(ec_empty())
    # Expand rows by model
    models_split <- strsplit(as.character(d$modelsUsed), ",\\s*")
    n_each <- lengths(models_split)
    d_exp <- d[rep(seq_len(nrow(d)), n_each), ]
    d_exp$model <- clean_model(unlist(models_split))
    d_exp <- d_exp[d_exp$model != "", ]
    d_exp$week <- floor_date(d_exp$date, "week")
    agg <- aggregate(totalCost ~ week + model, data = d_exp, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    all_weeks <- sort(unique(agg$week))
    models <- unique(agg$model)
    series <- lapply(models, function(m) {
      md <- agg[agg$model == m, ]
      vals <- rep(0, length(all_weeks))
      vals[match(md$week, all_weeks)] <- md$totalCost
      list(name = m, type = "line", data = I(round(vals, 2)))
    })
    ec_line(all_weeks, series)
  })

  # --- Token Analysis ---------------------------------------------------------
  output$token_daily <- renderUI({
    has_cc <- nrow(cc_d_proj()) > 0
    has_gem <- nrow(gem_d()) > 0
    if (!has_cc && !has_gem) return(ec_empty(h = "350px"))

    cc_tok <- gem_tok <- NULL
    if (has_cc) {
      cc_tok <- aggregate(totalTokens ~ date, data = cc_d_proj(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(cc_tok)[2] <- "claude"
    }
    if (has_gem) {
      gem_tok <- aggregate(total_tokens ~ date, data = gem_d(), FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(gem_tok)[2] <- "gemini"
    }

    if (has_cc && has_gem) {
      d <- merge(cc_tok, gem_tok, by = "date", all = TRUE)
      d$claude[is.na(d$claude)] <- 0
      d$gemini[is.na(d$gemini)] <- 0
      d <- d[order(d$date), ]
      series <- list(
        list(name = "Claude", type = "line", data = I(d$claude),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude)),
        list(name = "Gemini", type = "line", data = I(d$gemini),
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini)))
      ec_line(d$date, series, "350px", y_name = "Tokens (M)")
    } else if (has_cc) {
      cc_tok <- cc_tok[order(cc_tok$date), ]
      ec_line(cc_tok$date, list(list(name = "Claude", type = "line",
        data = I(cc_tok$claude), itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude))), "350px",
        y_name = "Tokens (M)")
    } else {
      gem_tok <- gem_tok[order(gem_tok$date), ]
      ec_line(gem_tok$date, list(list(name = "Gemini", type = "line",
        data = I(gem_tok$gemini), itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini))), "350px",
        y_name = "Tokens (M)")
    }
  })

  output$token_comp <- renderUI({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    all_d <- sort(unique(d$date))
    val_at <- function(agg, col, dates) {
      vals <- rep(0, length(dates))
      vals[match(agg$date, dates)] <- agg[[col]]
      vals
    }
    series <- list()
    # Use whichever column names exist (cmonitor vs raw ccusage format)
    tok_cols <- list(
      Input = intersect(c("inputTokens"), names(d)),
      Output = intersect(c("outputTokens"), names(d)),
      `Cache Create` = intersect(c("cacheCreation", "cacheCreationTokens"), names(d)),
      `Cache Read` = intersect(c("cacheRead", "cacheReadTokens"), names(d))
    )
    for (nm in names(tok_cols)) {
      col <- tok_cols[[nm]]
      if (length(col) > 0 && col[1] %in% names(d)) {
        agg <- aggregate(d[[col[1]]] ~ date, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
        names(agg)[2] <- "val"
        series[[length(series) + 1]] <- list(
          name = nm, type = "bar", stack = "tokens",
          data = I(val_at(agg, "val", all_d))
        )
      }
    }
    if (length(series) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    ec_bar(all_d, series)
  })

  output$token_weekly <- renderUI({
    rows <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d_proj()) > 0) {
      d <- cc_d_proj()
      d$week <- floor_date(d$date, "week")
      a <- aggregate(totalTokens ~ week, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      a$source <- "Claude"
      rows[[1]] <- a
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      d <- gem_d()
      d$week <- floor_date(d$date, "week")
      a <- aggregate(total_tokens ~ week, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      names(a)[2] <- "totalTokens"
      a$source <- "Gemini"
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- a
    }
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    d <- do.call(rbind, rows)
    all_weeks <- sort(unique(d$week))
    sources <- unique(d$source)
    series <- lapply(sources, function(s) {
      sd <- d[d$source == s, ]
      vals <- rep(0, length(all_weeks))
      vals[match(sd$week, all_weeks)] <- sd$totalTokens
      list(name = s, type = "bar", data = I(vals),
           itemStyle = list(color = if (s == "Claude") pal$claude else pal$gemini))
    })
    ec_bar(all_weeks, series)
  })

  # --- Sessions ---------------------------------------------------------------
  # Summary value boxes
  output$vb_sess_count <- renderText({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return("0")
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ]
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && !all(all_projects %in% input$projects)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    as.character(nrow(d))
  })
  output$vb_sess_duration <- renderText({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return("0 min")
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ]
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && !all(all_projects %in% input$projects)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    total <- sum(d$duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (total >= 60) sprintf("%.1f hr", total / 60) else sprintf("%.0f min", total)
  })
  output$vb_sess_avg <- renderText({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return("0 min")
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ]
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && !all(all_projects %in% input$projects)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0 min")
    avg <- mean(d$duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
    sprintf("%.1f min", avg)
  })

  output$sess_claude <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ]
    # Filter by selected projects
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && "project_short" %in% names(d)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(datatable(data.frame(Message = "No sessions for selected projects")))
    d <- d[order(d$started_at, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    d <- head(d, input$top_n)
    out <- data.frame(
      Project = if ("project_short" %in% names(d)) d$project_short else d$project,
      Started = paste(d$date, d$time_str),  # Use pre-extracted time
      `Duration (min)` = ifelse(is.na(d$duration_min), "—", sprintf("%.0f", d$duration_min)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
      check.names = FALSE
    )
    datatable(out, options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$sess_gemini <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(gem_sess)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    d <- gem_sess[order(gem_sess$total_cost, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    d <- head(d, input$top_n)
    out <- data.frame(
      Session = d$sessionId,
      Project = d$project,
      Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", d$total_cost),
      Tokens = format(d$total_tokens, big.mark = ","),
      Started = d$start_time,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    datatable(out, options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$sess_hist <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff() & u_sessions$duration_min > 0, ]
    # Filter by selected projects
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && "project_short" %in% names(d)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No sessions for selected projects"))
    h <- hist(d$duration_min, breaks = 20, plot = FALSE)
    ec_bar(round(h$mids, 1), list(
      list(name = "Sessions", type = "bar", data = I(h$counts),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$hist))))
  })

  output$sess_scatter <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff() & u_sessions$duration_min > 0, ]
    # Filter by selected projects
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && "project_short" %in% names(d)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No sessions for selected projects"))
    daily <- aggregate(
      cbind(n = duration_min, total_min = duration_min) ~ date,
      data = d, FUN = function(x) c(length(x), sum(x))
    )
    # aggregate with cbind produces a matrix column; flatten
    if (is.matrix(daily$n)) {
      daily_n <- daily$n[, 1]
      daily_tot <- daily$total_min[, 2]
      daily <- data.frame(date = daily$date, n = daily_n, total_min = daily_tot)
    } else {
      # fallback: compute separately
      n_agg <- aggregate(duration_min ~ date, data = d, FUN = length)
      t_agg <- aggregate(duration_min ~ date, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
      daily <- merge(n_agg, t_agg, by = "date", suffixes = c("_n", "_sum"))
      names(daily) <- c("date", "n", "total_min")
    }
    pts <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(daily)), function(i)
      list(as.character(daily$date[i]), daily$n[i], round(daily$total_min[i], 1)))
    ec_scatter(pts, pal$claude, x_type = "time", size_col = 3, scale = 2)
  })

  # --- By Project -------------------------------------------------------------
  # Session-weighted estimated cost by project
  proj_filtered <- reactive({
    if (!has_rows(cost_proj)) return(data.frame())
    d <- cost_proj
    d$date <- as.Date(d$date)
    d <- d[d$date >= cutoff(), ]
    # Shorten project names for display
    d$project_short <- shorten_proj(d$project)
    # Filter by selected projects
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && !all(all_projects %in% input$projects)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    d
  })

  output$proj_cost_total <- renderUI({
    d <- proj_filtered()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    # Aggregate total cost by project
    agg <- aggregate(est_cost ~ project_short, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    agg <- agg[order(agg$est_cost, decreasing = FALSE), ]  # Ascending for dot chart
    # Cleveland dot chart (horizontal)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis", axisPointer = list(type = "shadow")),
      grid = list(left = 120, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Est. Cost ($)"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(agg$project_short)),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter",
        data = I(round(agg$est_cost, 2)),
        symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude)
      ))
    ), h = "300px", aria_label = "Cleveland dot chart: estimated cost by project")
  })

  output$proj_sessions <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ]
    # Filter by selected projects
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && !all(all_projects %in% input$projects)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    # Count sessions per project
    agg <- aggregate(session_id ~ project_short, data = d, FUN = length)
    names(agg)[2] <- "n"
    agg <- agg[order(agg$n, decreasing = FALSE), ]
    # Cleveland dot chart
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis", axisPointer = list(type = "shadow")),
      grid = list(left = 120, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Sessions"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(agg$project_short)),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter",
        data = I(agg$n),
        symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini)
      ))
    ), h = "300px", aria_label = "Cleveland dot chart: session count by project")
  })

  output$proj_cost_daily <- renderUI({
    d <- proj_filtered()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    # Get top N projects by total cost
    totals <- aggregate(est_cost ~ project_short, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    top_proj <- head(totals[order(totals$est_cost, decreasing = TRUE), "project_short"], 8)
    d <- d[d$project_short %in% top_proj, ]
    # Pivot to wide format for stacked area
    all_dates <- sort(unique(d$date))
    series <- lapply(top_proj, function(p) {
      p_data <- d[d$project_short == p, c("date", "est_cost")]
      # Merge with all dates to fill gaps
      merged <- merge(data.frame(date = all_dates), p_data, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
      merged$est_cost[is.na(merged$est_cost)] <- 0
      list(
        name = p, type = "line", stack = "total", areaStyle = list(),
        data = I(round(merged$est_cost[order(merged$date)], 2))
      )
    })
    ec_line(all_dates, series, h = "350px", y_name = "Cost ($)",
            aria_label = "Stacked area chart: daily estimated cost by project")
  })

  output$proj_duration <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(u_sessions)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- u_sessions[u_sessions$date >= cutoff(), ]
    if (length(input$projects) > 0 && !all(all_projects %in% input$projects)) {
      d <- d[d$project_short %in% input$projects, ]
    }
    if (nrow(d) == 0 || !"duration_min" %in% names(d)) return(ec_empty())
    agg <- aggregate(duration_min ~ project_short, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    agg <- agg[order(agg$duration_min, decreasing = FALSE), ]
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis", axisPointer = list(type = "shadow")),
      grid = list(left = 120, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Minutes"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(agg$project_short)),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter",
        data = I(round(agg$duration_min, 1)),
        symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$highlight)
      ))
    ), h = "300px", aria_label = "Cleveland dot chart: total session duration by project")
  })

  output$proj_share_heatmap <- renderUI({
    d <- proj_filtered()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    # Get top 10 projects by total cost
    totals <- aggregate(est_cost ~ project_short, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    top_proj <- head(totals[order(totals$est_cost, decreasing = TRUE), "project_short"], 10)
    d <- d[d$project_short %in% top_proj, ]
    # Convert to heatmap data: [x_index, y_index, value]
    dates <- sort(unique(d$date))
    projs <- top_proj
    heat_data <- list()
    for (i in seq_along(dates)) {
      for (j in seq_along(projs)) {
        val <- d[d$date == dates[i] & d$project_short == projs[j], "share"]
        val <- if (length(val) == 0) 0 else round(val[1] * 100, 1)
        heat_data[[length(heat_data) + 1]] <- list(i - 1, j - 1, val)
      }
    }
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(position = "top",
        formatter = DT::JS("function(p){return p.value[2]+'% share'}")),
      grid = list(left = 100, bottom = 60, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(as.character(dates)), splitArea = list(show = TRUE)),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(projs), splitArea = list(show = TRUE)),
      visualMap = list(min = 0, max = 100, calculable = TRUE,
                       orient = "horizontal", left = "center", bottom = 5,
                       inRange = list(color = c("#0d1117", "#238636", "#40c463"))),
      series = list(list(
        name = "Share", type = "heatmap", data = heat_data,
        emphasis = list(itemStyle = list(shadowBlur = 10, shadowColor = "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)"))
      ))
    ), h = "300px", aria_label = "Heatmap: project cost share percentage by date")
  })

  # --- Time Blocks ------------------------------------------------------------
  blk <- reactive({
    if (!has_rows(cc_blocks)) return(data.frame())
    cc_blocks[cc_blocks$date >= (date_max - input$block_days), ]
  })

  output$block_table <- renderDT({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    n <- nrow(d)
    eff_end <- coalesce2(d$actualEndTime, d$endTime)
    out <- data.frame(
      Day = format(d$date, "%a %Y-%m-%d"),
      Start = format(d$startTime, "%H:%M"),
      End = format(eff_end, "%H:%M"),
      Duration = sprintf("%.1fh", d$duration_hrs),
      Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", d$costUSD),
      `$/hr` = sprintf("$%.2f", d$cost_per_hr),
      Tokens = format(if ("totalTokens" %in% names(d)) d$totalTokens else rep(0, n), big.mark = ","),
      `Tok/hr` = format(if ("tok_per_hr" %in% names(d)) d$tok_per_hr else rep(0, n), big.mark = ","),
      Models = if ("models" %in% names(d)) clean_model(d$models) else rep("-", n),
      check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    datatable(out,
      extensions = "RowGroup",
      options = list(
        pageLength = 50, dom = "rtip", scrollX = TRUE,
        rowGroup = list(
          dataSrc = 0,
          startRender = DT::JS("function(rows, group) {
            var dur=0, cost=0, tok=0;
            rows.every(function() {
              var d=this.data();
              dur += parseFloat(d[3]) || 0;
              cost += parseFloat(d[4].replace('$','')) || 0;
              tok += parseInt(d[6].replace(/,/g,'')) || 0;
            });
            return $('<tr style=\"font-weight:bold;background:#2a2a2a\"/>')
              .append('<td colspan=\"2\">' + group + '</td>')
              .append('<td>' + dur.toFixed(1) + 'h</td>')
              .append('<td>$' + cost.toFixed(2) + '</td>')
              .append('<td colspan=\"2\">' + tok.toLocaleString() + ' tok</td>')
              .append('<td colspan=\"2\">' + rows.count() + ' blocks</td>');
          }")
        ),
        columnDefs = list(
          list(visible = FALSE, targets = 0),
          list(targets = 8, render = DT::JS(
            "function(data, type, row) { return '<span style=\"white-space:nowrap\">' + data + '</span>'; }"
          ))
        ),
        order = list(list(0, "desc"))
      ),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$block_timeline <- renderUI({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    d <- d[order(d$startTime), ]
    pts <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i)
      list(round(d$costUSD[i], 2), round(d$duration_hrs[i], 2), round(d$costUSD[i], 2)))
    id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
    opt <- list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "item",
        formatter = "{c}"),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Cost ($)"),
      yAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Duration (h)"),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = pts,
                         itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude)))
    )
    j <- toJSON(opt, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")
    tagList(
      tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", style = "width:100%;height:300px"),
      tags$script(HTML(paste0(
        "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id, "'),'dark');",
        "var o=", j, ";",
        "o.series[0].symbolSize=function(d){return Math.max(6,Math.sqrt(d[2])*8)};",
        "o.tooltip.formatter=function(p){return '$'+p.value[0].toFixed(2)+' | '+p.value[1].toFixed(1)+'h'};",
        "c.setOption(o);new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
        ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'))})();"
      )))
    )
  })

  output$block_heatmap <- renderUI({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    d$wday_chr <- as.character(d$wday)
    heat_agg <- aggregate(costUSD ~ wday_chr + hour, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    day_names <- c("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun")
    all_combos <- expand.grid(hour = 0:23, wday_chr = day_names, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    heat <- merge(all_combos, heat_agg, by = c("wday_chr", "hour"), all.x = TRUE)
    heat$costUSD[is.na(heat$costUSD)] <- 0
    heat_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(heat)), function(i)
      list(heat$hour[i], match(heat$wday_chr[i], day_names) - 1, round(heat$costUSD[i], 2)))
    max_cost <- max(heat$costUSD, na.rm = TRUE)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "item"),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE),
      xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(0:23), name = "Hour"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(day_names)),
      visualMap = list(min = 0, max = max(max_cost, 1), calculable = TRUE,
        inRange = list(color = I(c("#1a1a1a", pal$orange, pal$gemini))),
        textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      series = list(list(type = "heatmap", data = heat_data,
        label = list(show = FALSE)))
    ))
  })

  # --- Commits -----------------------------------------------------------------
  commits_filt <- reactive({
    if (!has_rows(git_commits)) return(data.frame())
    git_commits[git_commits$date >= cutoff(), ]
  })

  output$vb_commits <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(nrow(d))
  })
  output$vb_median_lines <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(round(median(d$lines_changed, na.rm = TRUE)))
  })
  output$vb_mean_lines <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(round(mean(d$lines_changed, na.rm = TRUE)))
  })

  output$commit_hist <- renderUI({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty(h = "350px"))
    h <- hist(d$lines_changed, breaks = 30, plot = FALSE)
    ec_bar(round(h$mids), list(
      list(name = "Commits", type = "bar", data = I(h$counts),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$hist))), "350px")
  })

  output$commit_scatter_time <- renderUI({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    pts <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i)
      list(as.character(d$date[i]), d$lines_changed[i], d$files_changed[i]))
    ec_scatter(pts, pal$claude, x_type = "time", size_col = 3, scale = 3)
  })

  output$commit_scatter_add_del <- renderUI({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    pts <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i)
      list(d$lines_added[i], d$lines_deleted[i], d$files_changed[i]))
    ec_scatter(pts, pal$gemini, size_col = 3, scale = 3)
  })

  # --- Repo Health ------------------------------------------------------------
  bus_dot <- function(d, label = "Bus factor dot chart") {
    if (!has_rows(d)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- head(d[order(d$commits, decreasing = TRUE), ], 10)
    d <- d[nrow(d):1, ]  # reverse for bottom-up display
    total <- sum(d$commits)
    labels <- paste0(d$author, " (", round(d$commits / total * 100), "%)")
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0)),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 120),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Commits"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(labels)),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(d$commits),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc",
                     distance = 8)))
    ), aria_label = label)
  }
  output$rh_bus_all <- renderUI(bus_dot(git_bus$all_time, "Bus factor all time: contributor commit share"))
  output$rh_bus_6mo <- renderUI(bus_dot(git_bus$recent_6mo, "Bus factor 6 months: recent contributor concentration"))

  output$rh_velocity <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_vel)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- git_vel[order(git_vel$month), ]
    ec_line(d$month, list(
      list(name = "Commits", type = "line", data = I(d$commits),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude),
           areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.3))),
      y_name = "Commits")
  })

  output$rh_timing <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_timing)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- git_timing
    day_names <- c("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun")
    if (!"day_name" %in% names(d)) d$day_name <- day_names[d$weekday]
    heat_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i)
      list(as.integer(d$hour[i]), match(d$day_name[i], day_names) - 1,
           as.integer(d$commits[i])))
    max_c <- max(d$commits, na.rm = TRUE)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "item"),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE),
      xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(0:23), name = "Hour"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(day_names)),
      visualMap = list(min = 0, max = max(max_c, 1), calculable = TRUE,
        inRange = list(color = I(c("#1a1a1a", pal$accent, pal$claude))),
        textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      series = list(list(type = "heatmap", data = heat_data,
        label = list(show = FALSE)))
    ), aria_label = "Commit timing heatmap: when commits happen by hour and day")
  })

  output$rh_file_growth <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_file_growth)) return(ec_empty("No file growth data available"))
    d <- git_file_growth
    # Parse date
    d$date <- as.Date(d$date)
    # These are 6-month rolling aggregates, show all snapshots
    # Aggregate by date (sum across projects if multiple)
    agg <- aggregate(cbind(files_added, files_deleted) ~ date, data = d, FUN = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    agg <- agg[order(agg$date), ]

    if (nrow(agg) == 0) return(ec_empty("No data available"))

    # Create line chart with two series
    series <- list(
      list(name = "Added (6mo)", type = "line", data = I(agg$files_added),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$accent),
           areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.3)),
      list(name = "Deleted (6mo)", type = "line", data = I(agg$files_deleted),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini),
           areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.3))
    )
    ec_line(agg$date, series, y_name = "Files (6-month rolling)",
            aria_label = "6-month rolling file growth: added vs deleted")
  })

  output$rh_churn <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_churn)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- head(git_churn[order(git_churn$changes, decreasing = TRUE), ], 15)
    d <- d[nrow(d):1, ]  # reverse for horizontal dotchart
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0)),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 150),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Changes"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(basename(d$file))),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(d$changes),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$orange),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc",
                     distance = 6)))
    ), aria_label = "Churn hotspots: most-modified files in last 6 months")
  })

  output$rh_bugs <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(git_bugs)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- head(git_bugs[order(git_bugs$fixes, decreasing = TRUE), ], 15)
    d <- d[nrow(d):1, ]
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0)),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 150),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Fixes"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(basename(d$file))),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(d$fixes),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$gemini),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc",
                     distance = 6)))
    ), aria_label = "Bug fixes by file: files with most fix commits")
  })

  output$rh_todo <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(git_todo)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    datatable(git_todo, options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$rh_crisis <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(git_crisis)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    datatable(git_crisis, options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$gh_events_chart <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(gh_events)) {
      return(ec_empty("No GitHub events data available"))
    }

    # Parse dates and aggregate by date and event type using base R
    gh_events$date <- as.Date(substr(gh_events$created_at, 1, 10))

    # Count events by date and type using aggregate
    event_summary <- aggregate(
      created_at ~ date + event_type,
      data = gh_events,
      FUN = length
    )
    names(event_summary)[3] <- "n"

    if (nrow(event_summary) == 0) {
      return(ec_empty("No events in selected period"))
    }

    # Get unique dates and event types
    all_dates <- sort(unique(event_summary$date))
    event_types <- unique(event_summary$event_type)

    # Create series for each event type
    series <- lapply(event_types, function(et) {
      counts <- sapply(all_dates, function(d) {
        idx <- event_summary$date == d & event_summary$event_type == et
        if (any(idx)) event_summary$n[idx][1] else 0
      })
      list(
        name = et,
        type = "bar",
        stack = "events",
        data = I(counts)
      )
    })

    ec_bar(all_dates, series, h = "350px", y_name = "Events",
      aria_label = "GitHub issue events by type over time")
  })

  # --- Calibration ------------------------------------------------------------
  output$cal_reliability <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(cal_buckets)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- cal_buckets
    # Scatter: predicted (x) vs actual (y) + diagonal reference line
    pts <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i)
      list(d$mean_predicted[i], d$actual_accuracy[i], d$n[i]))
    id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
    opt <- list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "item"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0),
        list(type = "inside", yAxisIndex = 0)
      ),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Predicted", min = 0, max = 1),
      yAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Actual", min = 0, max = 1),
      series = list(
        list(type = "line", data = list(list(0, 0), list(1, 1)),
             lineStyle = list(type = "dashed", color = "#666"),
             symbol = "none", name = "Perfect"),
        list(type = "scatter", data = pts, name = "Buckets",
             itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude))
      )
    )
    j <- toJSON(opt, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")
    tagList(
      tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", style = "width:100%;height:300px"),
      tags$script(HTML(paste0(
        "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id, "'),'dark');",
        "var o=", j, ";",
        "o.series[1].symbolSize=function(d){return Math.max(8,Math.sqrt(d[2])*6)};",
        "o.series[1].label={show:true,formatter:function(p){return p.value[2]+' preds'},color:'#ccc',fontSize:10};",
        "c.setOption(o);new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
        ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'))})();"
      )))
    )
  })

  output$cal_brier <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw) || !"brier" %in% names(preds_raw)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- preds_raw[!is.na(preds_raw$outcome_recorded_at), ]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    d <- d[order(d$outcome_recorded_at), ]
    # Cumulative rolling Brier
    d$cum_brier <- cumsum(d$brier) / seq_len(nrow(d))
    ec_line(d$outcome_recorded_at, list(
      list(name = "Brier (rolling)", type = "line", data = I(round(d$cum_brier, 4)),
           itemStyle = list(color = pal$claude),
           markLine = list(data = list(list(yAxis = 0.25, name = "Uninformative")),
             lineStyle = list(color = "#666", type = "dashed")))
    ))
  })

  output$cal_by_type <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw) || !"task_type" %in% names(preds_raw)) return(ec_empty())
    d <- preds_raw[!is.na(preds_raw$outcome), ]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty())
    d$outcome_num <- ifelse(d$outcome == TRUE | d$outcome == "true", 1,
                     ifelse(d$outcome == "partial", 0.5, 0))
    agg <- aggregate(cbind(accuracy = outcome_num, n = outcome_num) ~ task_type,
      data = d, FUN = function(x) c(mean(x), length(x)))
    if (is.matrix(agg$accuracy)) {
      types <- agg$task_type
      acc <- round(agg$accuracy[, 1], 2)
      counts <- as.integer(agg$n[, 2])
    } else {
      types <- agg$task_type
      acc <- round(agg$accuracy, 2)
      counts <- as.integer(agg$n)
    }
    labels <- paste0(types, " (n=", counts, ")")
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(), restore = list(), saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0)),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 120),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Accuracy", min = 0, max = 1),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(labels)),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(acc),
        symbol = "circle", symbolSize = 12,
        itemStyle = list(color = pal$accent),
        label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc")))
    ))
  })

  output$cal_by_project <- renderUI({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw) || !"project_name" %in% names(preds_raw)) return(ec_empty("No project data"))
    d <- preds_raw[!is.na(preds_raw$outcome), ]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(ec_empty("No resolved predictions"))

    # Convert outcome to numeric
    d$outcome_num <- ifelse(d$outcome == TRUE | d$outcome == "true", 1,
                            ifelse(d$outcome == "partial", 0.5, 0))

    # Aggregate by project
    agg <- aggregate(cbind(accuracy = outcome_num, n = outcome_num) ~ project_name,
                     data = d, FUN = function(x) c(mean(x), length(x)))
    # Flatten the matrix columns
    agg_df <- data.frame(
      project = agg$project_name,
      accuracy = agg$accuracy[,1],
      n = agg$n[,2]
    )
    agg_df <- agg_df[order(agg_df$accuracy, decreasing = TRUE), ]

    # Cleveland dot plot
    pts <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(agg_df)), function(i) {
      list(value = c(round(agg_df$accuracy[i] * 100, 1), agg_df$project[i]),
           symbolSize = max(8, sqrt(agg_df$n[i]) * 5))
    })
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "item", formatter = "{b}: {c}%"),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, left = 120),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", min = 0, max = 100, name = "Accuracy %"),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(rev(agg_df$project))),
      series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = I(rev(pts)),
                         itemStyle = list(color = "#4daf4a")))
    ), aria_label = "Accuracy by project dotchart")
  })

  output$cal_log <- renderDT({
    if (!has_rows(preds_raw)) return(datatable(data.frame()))
    d <- preds_raw
    cols <- intersect(c("prediction_id", "project_name", "task_type",
      "task_description", "p_success", "outcome", "outcome_notes"), names(d))
    d <- d[, cols, drop = FALSE]
    datatable(d, options = list(dom = "ftip", pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
